title: D9020616
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''D9020616''' was the designation of a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] that contained [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma's]] official decree that created [[Alpha Blue]] and established its operational parameters. It was stored in the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State's]] personal archives.

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]''

[[Category:New Republic laws and acts]]
